channel.title: Microsoft Entra ID on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Microsoft Entra ID on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Microsoft Entra ID security updates: Passkeys are the default authentication method in Entra ID
item.description:
Microsoft Entra ID now uses passkeys as the default sign-in method and introduces a new authentication model for SMS and voice. The post also points users to preparation guidance for the change.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Microsoft Entra ID-based access for Azure Blob Storage SFTP
item.description:
Microsoft Entra ID-based access for Azure Blob Storage SFTP is now generally available in all regions. It allows Entra ID identities, including guest users via Entra External Identities, to connect to Azure Blob Storage over SFTP.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Managed Redis now supports Entra ID based RBAC for data management
item.description:
Azure Managed Redis public preview adds Microsoft Entra ID-based RBAC for data access. This lets you control read, write, and admin permissions without using shared keys, using Redis ACLs underneath.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Secure, Modern Access to Azure Files on macOS with MS Entra ID
item.description:
Azure Files now supports macOS access with Microsoft Entra ID authentication in public preview. This adds identity-based, secure access to file shares for cross-platform teams.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Update: Microsoft Entra ID token refresh support for Python, .NET, and JavaScript in Azure Database for PostgreSQL
item.description:
Microsoft Entra ID token refresh is now available in Python, .NET, and JavaScript client libraries for Azure Database for PostgreSQL. This reduces the need to manually handle token renewal in applications.

  • Source: Azure Updates
